The question is asking to identify which school had no API (Academic Performance Index) for 2011. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "2011" column in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(2011) operation. This will help us see the schools with the lowest API scores first, where a missing or zero value would indicate no API for that school.

The question is asking to identify which school had no API (Academic Performance Index) score listed for the year 2011. Since each row represents a school and the "2011" column contains the API scores for that year, we need to look for schools with missing or zero values in this column. We can use the f_group_column(2011) operation to group the schools based on their API scores to analyze this situation.
The row for Theodore Roosevelt High School has an empty value in the 2011 column, indicating that there was no API for this school in 2011. All other schools have values listed for their 2011 API.
